title: Scene quality
description: Checks whether structured scenes preserve source content and useful boundaries.

checks.title: Coverage
checks.question: Does the scene list cover every important source event without omission?
checks.description: Compare the output to the source case context.

checks.title: Order
checks.question: Are scenes in the same order as the source?

checks.title: Scene boundaries
checks.question: Are scene boundaries based on stable place, continuous time, immediate focus, cast changes, or persistent mode shifts?

checks.title: No hallucinations
checks.question: Does the output avoid inventing events not present in the source?

checks.title: Concise labels
checks.question: Are scene titles and summaries concise and specific?
